subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God and God of earth and heaven! I beseech Thee by the Dawning-Places of Thy Revelation and the Manifestations of Thine inspiration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا الهی و اله الارض و السماء اسئلک بمشارق وحیک و مظاهر الهامک و
subcodes.subjects: @Seal of the Prophets, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for protection, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
